The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Ghastly Corridor

Walls pulse like heartbeats.
Apparatus conduits to endless night.
Layout defies logical paths.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • this isn't so bad. it's nice and quiet here.
  • Dead end? Let's build a dungeon here and do kinky uwus
  • dang. It really is a dead end. I thought they were lying :(
  • dead end?
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
